name: Lost Meow
short_description: In the winter city, a cute cat fights for survival, begging for food from pedestrians and warming itself on manhole covers. Avoid dangers like passing cars, hostile dogs, and unfriendly pedestrians. Help the kitty get home in this captivating arcade!
detailed_description: This game is for those who like difficult, but still possible tests. You will play as a cat who is fighting for survival in a cold winter city, moving on his way to home - because the cat is lost. Moving along the sidewalks, beg for food from passers-by, bask on road hatches so as not to freeze, avoid dangers - angry dogs and fast-moving cars on the road, dodge the feet of passers-by - they can kick you even without noticing! Help the cat to get home, this task is not so simple, and present a real challenge!
